name: Spicy Stir Fried Vegetables
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat peanut oil to 375°F (190°C). Brown tofu in the peanut oil and remove with a paper towel to drain. Pour off all but 3 tablespoons of peanut oil.
2. In a large skillet or wok, sauté onion, garlic, and ginger root in 3 tablespoons peanut oil until soft.
3. Add carrots, cabbage, and chili pepper. Stir-fry until vegetables are tender-crisp.
4. Stir in tomato paste, peanut butter, lemon juice, parsley, salt, pepper, cilantro, and thyme. Cook for 5 minutes, stirring to coat the vegetables and tofu with the sauce.
